Yo!!!

I've REALLY been grinding on this bot for a while now, and man, it took way longer than I thought it would. But hey, our favorite little gremlin is finally accurate enough and behaving the way I think is spot-on.

A lot of people have been asking for Koleda, so here she is! Oh, and shoutout to Lewdrover's art—it gave me the final boost of inspiration I needed to set up the scenario (of course, I left out any Ben involvement because, you KNOW!)

Anyway, if you spot any issues or anything, just drop a comment. I'm always checking them and updating my bots regularly based on that feedback.
